description: Production-grade MLOps system for general retail: real-time recommendations, demand forecasting, dynamic pricing, and inventory management with automated drift detection and retraining.

phases.name: Foundation & Event Ingestion
phases.theme: Kafka event streaming, user/product schemas, click simulation, CI/CD

phases.name: Feature Engineering & User Behaviour
phases.theme: Session features, purchase history, product embeddings, feature store

phases.name: Recommendation Engine
phases.theme: Collaborative filtering, two-tower model, real-time serving, A/B testing

phases.name: Demand Forecasting & Dynamic Pricing
phases.theme: Prophet, XGBoost forecaster, price elasticity, inventory alerts

phases.name: Drift Detection & Auto Retraining
phases.theme: Evidently drift, Airflow retraining DAG, validation, canary

phases.name: Hardening, Tests & Documentation
phases.theme: Integration tests, load tests, security, full docs
